title: Axel's Cozy Night Light
synopsis: When little Axel feels scared of the dark at bedtime, his mama helps him discover that his special night light and brave heart can make everything feel safe and cozy again.

pages.text: Axel loved his cozy bedroom with the soft blue walls and fluffy teddy bear. But when Mama turned off the big light, everything looked different. The shadows seemed scary and dark. "I don't like it!" said Axel, feeling worried and scared.

illustration.description: A young Latino boy with curly dark hair wearing striped pajamas sits on his bed looking worried. His bedroom has soft blue walls, a wooden bed with colorful blankets, and a brown teddy bear beside him. The room is dimly lit with long shadows stretching across the floor. His expression shows concern and uncertainty.
illustration.alt: Axel sitting on his bed looking scared in his dimly lit bedroom

pages.text: "What's wrong, mi amor?" asked Mama gently. She had kind brown eyes and wore a cozy purple sweater. Axel pointed at the dark corners. "The shadows look scary, Mama. I feel afraid." Mama sat on his bed and gave him a warm hug. "It's okay to feel scared sometimes," she said softly.

illustration.description: A loving Latina woman with long dark hair in a purple sweater sits on the edge of the bed, hugging her son. Axel looks up at her with trusting eyes while pointing toward the dark corner of the room. The scene is warm and comforting, with soft lighting from the hallway creating a gentle glow around them both.
illustration.alt: Mama hugging Axel on his bed while he points to scary shadows

pages.text: Mama reached for something special on the nightstand. "Look, Axel! Your magic night light!" She plugged in a small lamp that glowed with soft, golden stars. The scary shadows disappeared, and everything looked cozy again. "Now I feel brave and happy!" said Axel with a big smile. "Sweet dreams, my brave boy," whispered Mama, tucking him in tight.

illustration.description: The bedroom is now filled with warm, golden light from a star-shaped night light on the nightstand. Axel is tucked into bed with his teddy bear, smiling peacefully. Mama is leaning down to kiss his forehead goodnight. The room feels cozy and safe, with gentle star patterns projected on the ceiling and walls creating a magical atmosphere.
illustration.alt: Axel smiling in his cozy bed with his star night light glowing

metadata.illustrationStyle: Bright, cheerful cartoon style with expressive faces. Bold primary colors. Rounded, friendly shapes. Slightly textured backgrounds like construction paper.

questions.question: How did Axel feel when the lights went out?
questions.explanation: Axel felt scared when the big light turned off and he saw scary shadows.

questions.question: Who helped Axel feel better?
questions.explanation: Mama helped Axel by giving him a hug and showing him the special night light.

questions.question: What made Axel feel brave again?
questions.explanation: The magic night light with golden stars made the scary shadows go away and helped Axel feel brave.

questions.question: How did Axel feel at the end of the story?
questions.explanation: At the end, Axel felt happy and brave because his room was cozy and safe with the night light.

pages.title: Fill in the Missing Words
pages.text: Axel felt _____ when the lights went out. Mama gave him a warm _____ to help him feel better. The magic night light made everything feel _____ and safe.
